title: Release ArchMap v0.2.1
description: Prepare, verify, tag, publish, and deploy the v0.2.1 patch release while leaving npm publication to the package owner.
decision_notes: Release the routing, camera sensitivity, and interactive edge-label endpoint highlighting fixes as patch version 0.2.1.
Keep npm publication as a human-owned action because registry authentication and @archmap/core ownership cannot be delegated safely.
Keep the v0.2.1 tag on release commit d21a142; the following AOF handoff commit is operational metadata only.
verification: npm pack --dry-run = 72 files, 316.8 kB package, 1.1 MB unpacked
